provenance_line: Fitzpatrick Lab, Dartmouth College | Numerical N=4 TLS: amplitude and multi-pulse (two-pulse) control
what_it_shows: Amplitude and multi-pulse control of a 4-TLS ensemble. a: ring-down map (single pulse); b: amplitude sweep at the optimal drive frequency (collapse-and-revival); c: two-pulse protocol (A2 swept, A1 fixed, gap 100 ns).

physical_system.system: N = 4 coupled TLS, Lindblad master equation
physical_system.TLS_frequencies_note: uniform[3.0, 5.0] GHz, seed 2072025; the resulting w_i/2pi = 3.49, 3.17, 4.10, 4.19 GHz.

drive_and_pulse.freq_star_rule: argmax over the panel-a drive-frequency sweep of the population summed over the post-pulse tail (t > pulse1_ns).

provenance.attribution: Uses code and simulation methods from the Fitzpatrick Lab, Dartmouth College.
provenance.panel_c_note: Panel c sweeps A2 (second pulse) with A1 fixed.
